# Requirements

| ID | Class | Description | Source |
|----|-------|-------------|--------|
| R001 | functional | Node agent must connect via WebSocket and relay PTY output | PROJECT.md |
| R002 | non-functional | Server must support Docker Compose deployment with no exposed ports | PROJECT.md |
| R003 | operational | All node↔server communication must use PROTOCOL.md wire format | PROTOCOL.md |
